description: Salesforce Headless 360 CLI - the agent-context packager for Salesforce. Signed, FLS-safe, cross-surface bundles any agent can consume.

tools.name: accounts_get
tools.description: Fetch one Account by Id. Returns Account.

tools.name: accounts_list
tools.description: List accounts via SOQL. Returns array of Account.

tools.name: agent_advance
tools.description: Advance an Opportunity to a validated stage. Requires confirm:true unless dry_run:true.

params.name: confirm_bulk
params.description: Confirm intentional bulk writes by passing the exact record count

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Preview payload without DML or audit writes

params.name: idempotency_key
params.description: Optional idempotency key recorded in audit

params.name: mock
params.description: Run against the in-process Salesforce mock server when available

params.name: run_as_user
params.description: SF User Id required in JWT mode

tools.name: agent_brief
tools.description: Render a markdown + JSON brief for one Opportunity, field-gated so redactions don't leak through narrative.

tools.name: agent_close_case
tools.description: Close a Case with a resolution. Requires confirm:true unless dry_run:true.

params.name: confirm_bulk
params.description: Confirm intentional bulk writes by passing the exact record count

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Preview payload without DML or audit writes

params.name: idempotency_key
params.description: Optional idempotency key recorded in audit

params.name: mock
params.description: Run against the in-process Salesforce mock server when available

params.name: run_as_user
params.description: SF User Id required in JWT mode

tools.name: agent_context
tools.description: Assemble a signed agent-context bundle for one Salesforce Account. Returns the bundle JSON with envelope + manifest + signature. Respects FLS and compliance redactions when the local sync has them mapped.

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Preview what would be bundled without signing or persisting

params.name: run_as_user
params.description: SF User Id to scope FLS against (required in JWT mode)

tools.name: agent_create
tools.description: Create one Salesforce record with a signed, audited write intent. Requires confirm:true unless dry_run:true.

params.name: confirm_bulk
params.description: Confirm intentional bulk writes by passing the exact record count

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Preview payload without DML or audit writes

params.name: fields
params.description: Field values to write as a JSON object

params.name: mock
params.description: Run against the in-process Salesforce mock server when available

params.name: run_as_user
params.description: SF User Id required in JWT mode

tools.name: agent_decay
tools.description: Score how stale the CRM data is for an account, 0-100 (higher = fresher). Returns structured signals.

tools.name: agent_doctor
tools.description: Machine-readable health status of the CLI's sources (auth, local store, Apex companion, Data Cloud, Slack linkage, competing tools detected). Use this before other tool calls to introspect failures.

tools.name: agent_execute_plan
tools.description: Verify and execute a signed write plan. Requires confirm:true.

params.name: confirm_bulk
params.description: Confirm intentional bulk writes by passing the exact record count

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Preview execution without DML or audit writes

params.name: mock
params.description: Run against the in-process Salesforce mock server when available

params.name: plan
params.description: Write plan JSON object or base64-encoded JSON string

tools.name: agent_log_activity
tools.description: Log a completed call/email Task or meeting Event. Requires confirm:true unless dry_run:true.

params.name: confirm_bulk
params.description: Confirm intentional bulk writes by passing the exact record count

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Preview payload without DML or audit writes

params.name: duration
params.description: Optional duration in seconds for Task activities

params.name: mock
params.description: Run against the in-process Salesforce mock server when available

params.name: run_as_user
params.description: SF User Id required in JWT mode

params.name: type
params.description: Activity type: call, email, or meeting

params.name: what
params.description: Related WhatId such as an Account or Opportunity

params.name: who
params.description: Related WhoId such as a Contact

tools.name: agent_note
tools.description: Post a Chatter FeedItem note to one record. Requires confirm:true unless dry_run:true.

params.name: confirm_bulk
params.description: Confirm intentional bulk writes by passing the exact record count

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Preview payload without DML or audit writes

params.name: entity
params.description: Record Id to receive the Chatter note

params.name: mock
params.description: Run against the in-process Salesforce mock server when available

params.name: run_as_user
params.description: SF User Id required in JWT mode

tools.name: agent_refresh
tools.description: Force a fresh sync of the CRM data before the next bundle assembly. Useful when an agent knows the cache is stale.

tools.name: agent_sign_plan
tools.description: Append a local countersignature to a write plan. Requires confirm:true.

params.name: confirm
params.description: Pass true to confirm local plan mutation

params.name: output
params.description: Optional output path for the signed plan

params.name: plan
params.description: Write plan JSON object or base64-encoded JSON string

tools.name: agent_update
tools.description: Patch one Salesforce record with a signed, audited write intent. Requires confirm:true unless dry_run:true.

params.name: confirm_bulk
params.description: Confirm intentional bulk writes by passing the exact record count

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Preview payload without DML or audit writes

params.name: fields
params.description: Field values to write as a JSON object

params.name: idempotency_key
params.description: Optional idempotency key recorded in audit

params.name: mock
params.description: Run against the in-process Salesforce mock server when available

params.name: run_as_user
params.description: SF User Id required in JWT mode

tools.name: agent_upsert
tools.description: Upsert one Salesforce record by SF360 idempotency key. Requires confirm:true unless dry_run:true.

params.description: Confirm intentional bulk writes by passing the exact record count

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Preview payload without DML or audit writes

params.name: fields
params.description: Field values to write as a JSON object

params.name: mock
params.description: Run against the in-process Salesforce mock server when available

params.name: run_as_user
params.description: SF User Id required in JWT mode

tools.name: agent_verify
tools.description: Verify a previously-generated bundle signed with an org-registered key. Returns structured pass/fail with warnings.

params.name: live
params.description: Re-fetch the org's key collection and check retirement

params.name: strict
params.description: Combine live + deep and fail on expired exp

tools.name: agent_write_audit_inspect
tools.description: Inspect one local write audit row.

tools.name: agent_write_audit_list
tools.description: List local signed write audit rows.

params.name: since
params.description: Only include rows generated at or after this RFC3339 timestamp

params.name: sobject
params.description: Filter by Salesforce object API name

tools.name: agent_write_audit_verify
tools.description: Verify one local write audit row's signed write intent.

tools.name: cases_list
tools.description: List cases. Returns array of Case.

tools.name: contacts_get
tools.description: Fetch one Contact by Id. Returns Contact.

tools.name: contacts_list
tools.description: List contacts for an account or by query. Returns array of Contact.

tools.name: context
tools.description: Get API domain context: resource taxonomy, auth requirements, query tips, and unique capabilities. Call this first.

tools.name: events_list
tools.description: List events. Returns array of Event.

tools.name: limits_get
tools.description: Current org limits. Returns Limits.

tools.name: opportunities_get
tools.description: Fetch one Opportunity by Id. Returns Opportunity.

tools.name: opportunities_list
tools.description: List opportunities. Returns array of Opportunity.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search across all synced data. Faster than paginating list endpoints. Requires sync first.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query (supports FTS5 syntax: AND, OR, NOT, quotes for phrases)

tools.name: sql
tools.description: Run read-only SQL against local database. Use for ad-hoc analysis, aggregations, and joins across synced resources. Requires sync first.

params.name: query
params.description: SQL query (SELECT only). Tables match resource names.

tools.name: sync
tools.description: Sync API data to local SQLite database. Run this before using search or sql tools. Supports incremental sync.

params.name: resources
params.description: Comma-separated resource types to sync (omit for all)

tools.name: tasks_list
tools.description: List tasks. Returns array of Task.
